title: sideritis hirsuta subsp. pourretii
intro: Sideritis hirsuta subsp. pourretii, also known as Pourret's Sideritis or French Mountain Tea, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the genus Sideritis, native to the Mediterranean region. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues, reducing stress and anxiety, and exhibiting antiviral and antibacterial properties. Sideritis hirsuta subsp. pourretii is typically prepared as an herbal tea by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water, with some also using it in tinctures, capsules, or as a supplement.
